Variables

str Pinocchio2fits.VERSION = 'v5.0'
 
bool Pinocchio2fits.CATALOGS = True
 
bool Pinocchio2fits.PLC = True
 
bool Pinocchio2fits.HISTORIES = True
 
dict Pinocchio2fits.params
 
 Pinocchio2fits.param_fname = sys.argv[1]
 
dict Pinocchio2fits.runflag = params['RunFlag'][0]
 
dict Pinocchio2fits.output_fname = params['OutputList'][0]
 
 Pinocchio2fits.outputs = np.loadtxt(output_fname,unpack=True)
 
str Pinocchio2fits.pin_fname = f'pinocchio.{z:6.4f}.{runflag}.catalog.out'
 
 Pinocchio2fits.cat = rp.catalog(pin_fname)
 
str Pinocchio2fits.fits_fname = pin_fname[:-3]+'fits'
